## Verses (6)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Will you for ever put me out of your memory, O Lord? will your face for ever be turned away from me? | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | How long is my soul to be in doubt, with sorrow in my heart all the day? how long will he who is against me be given power over me? | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Let my voice come before you, and give me an answer, O Lord my God; let your light be shining on me, so that the sleep of death may not overtake me; | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | And he who is against me may not say, I have overcome him; and those who are troubling me may not be glad when I am moved. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | But I have had faith in your mercy; my heart will be glad in your salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | I will make a song to the Lord, because he has given me my reward. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
